git-mem-sync.description: git-mem (synchronous writes). Every write commits immediately to git.
git-mem-sync.portability: highest — full git history, transferable to any git host

git-mem-async.description: git-mem (async writes, 10ms flush). Batches commits for throughput.
git-mem-async.portability: highest — same git backing as sync variant

engram.description: engram — session/observation store backed by SQLite. No direct key lookup; reads use full-text search.
engram.portability: medium — SQLite file is portable but no git history

mcp-server-memory.description: Official MCP knowledge-graph memory. Stores entities with typed observations and relations.
mcp-server-memory.portability: medium — single JSONL file, no versioning
